label: House Mode
info: House Mode orchestrator (STATE-ONLY). Occupancy Home/Away/Sleeping + storm/maintenance/guest overlays. Sleeping = 23:00–07:00 + adult home + 20m no-activity (motion/presence, any light on-off, any dimmer press) + TVs off + sitting-room lights off. Wake = first activity from 06:00 (2h re-entry block). No tag. No consumers wired yet.

label: Heating Control
info: DRAFT 18-06-2026 - DISABLED. Schedule + presence -> climate.netatmo_smart_thermostat via HomeKit. Set Netatmo native schedule to flat night baseline before enabling. Away->night 19.5, 24h-empty->away 12 (input_boolean.heating_extended_away toggle, defaults ON). 30-min heartbeat re-assert. See project_heating_nodered memory.

label: House Alarm
info: House alarm: armed/disarmed by house_mode (Away→arm_away, Sleeping→arm_night, Home→disarm). Alarm state notifications for House+Shed to all people. Shed auto-arm = NFC 2h re-arm (see Alarm NFC Tags flow). Battery low alerts (residents). Built 19-06-2026, updated 30-06-2026.

label: Alarm NFC Tags
info: Front-door NFC -> disarm house + TTS. Back-door NFC -> disarm shed for 2h then auto re-arm + TTS (each). Built 19-06-2026.

label: Infra Health & Alerts
info: Consolidated infra health + backup/Zabbix alerts (migrated from HA 28-06-2026). Group A: ih-watch->ih-engine. Group B: 4 http-in. All -> ih-send (type-prefix + quiet-hours 22-07 + 07:00 flush).
